---
title: 'Learnables'
date: '2014-03-13T05:52:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6694132715720972514'
blogger_filename: '/p/learnables.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
---

Ready,... Set,.... Learn!!! There is never a time in life when you should not be learning something new, increasing your knowledge and trying new things. And here are some things I am learning and trying... hopefully they can help you as you craft.<br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="background: #5e3f9d; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: inset 0 0px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 1px 0 #000; text-align: center;">
<embed flashvars="host=picasaweb.google.com&amp;hl=en_US&amp;feat=flashalbum&amp;RGB=0x5e3f9d&amp;feed=https%3A%2F%2Fpicasaweb.google.com%2Fdata%2Ffeed%2Fapi%2Fuser%2F115276805483167457930%2Falbumid%2F5988505180570627025%3Falt%3Drss%26kind%3Dphoto%26hl%3Den_US" height="192" pluginspage="http://www.macromedia.com/go/getflashplayer" src="https://photos.gstatic.com/media/slideshow.swf" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="288"></embed></div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Rope%20Bowls" target="_blank"><img height="216" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/to-20be-20sort-202012-20195-aac25d980600.jpg" width="288" /></a>&nbsp; &nbsp; <span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif; font-size: x-large; vertical-align: 200%;">&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Rope%20Bowls" target="_blank">Rope Bowls</a></span></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Mache%20n%20Shapes" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: xx-large; vertical-align: 200%;" target="_blank">Mache n Shapes</a>&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Mache%20n%20Shapes" target="_blank"><img height="216" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/to-20be-20sort-202012-20215-f0e434ff98bc.jpg" width="288" /></a></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
